V21_HCC1 in this data file 
(whereas the same HCC in the V22 file is called V22_HCC1). The HCC numbering may apply to different condition 
categories in different models. For example, in V21 and V22 HCC54 was Drug/Alcohol Psychosis; for V23 and V24 
HCC54 is Substance Use with Psychotic Complications. 

Table 6. Naming conventions for HCCs — V21 example 

Variable name Condition 
V21_HCC1 HIV/AIDS (V21 HCC1) 
V21_HCC2 Septicemia/shock (V21 HCC2) 
V21_HCC6 Opportunistic infections (V21 HCC6)
